## Problem

What problem should this solve?

## Proposed change

Describe the smallest useful change.

## Affected area

- orchestrator
- chatgpt-web-bridge
- preparation workflow
- self-improvement or operator flow
- docs or repo tooling

## Constraints

List any boundary, runtime, or policy constraints that matter.

## Additional context

Add examples, references, or prior discussion if helpful.
